hero.desc1: Specializing in building refined digital experiences with
hero.desc2: . Currently shaping internal systems at Ocare Health Hub.

exp.title: Experience
exp.job1_b1: Co-designed the UX/UI in Figma for both Admin and Participant interfaces of "Attendly," a training management system.
exp.job1_b2: Developed the frontend Participant module using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS, enabling users to seamlessly check in/out, join checkpoints, complete quizzes, and submit feedback.
exp.job1_b3: Implemented attendance tracking features to accurately monitor participant data for each event.
exp.job2_b1: Developed the frontend interface for the Student Loan Fund application system, utilized by the Student Registration Office to streamline application and document management processes.
exp.job2_b2: Built responsive and user-friendly web pages using Vue.js, JavaScript, CSS, and Bootstrap, ensuring seamless interaction with an SQL-based backend.

projects.subtitle: Selected Work
projects.title: Featured Projects
projects.desc: Focused on building functional systems and clean user interfaces.
projects.p1_short: Training management system for Ocare Health Hub. Co-designed UX/UI and developed the participant module for seamless check-ins and feedback.
projects.p1_long: Attendly is a comprehensive training management system developed for Ocare Health Hub. My role focused on co-designing the overall UX/UI and taking full ownership of the participant module. This involved creating intuitive flows for user registration, seamless event check-ins (QR code integration), and automated post-event feedback collection.
projects.p2_short: Frontend interface for MFU Student Loan Fund system. Optimized documentation processes to streamline registration office workflows.
projects.p2_long: Developed the frontend interface for the Mae Fah Luang University (MFU) Student Loan Fund system. The project aimed to digitize and optimize the complex documentation process for student loans. I utilized Vue.js and Bootstrap to create a responsive, accessible, and user-friendly dashboard.
projects.p3_short: Developed a cross-platform mobile application for a vehicle reservation system, focused on intuitive booking flows and clean UI.
projects.p3_long: A cross-platform mobile application built with Flutter and Dart for a vehicle rental service. The app features intuitive booking flows, date selection, vehicle browsing, and a clean, modern user interface designed to enhance the customer booking experience.
projects.p4_short: Designed UX/UI and developed a facial recognition system via ThaiID to authenticate Wi-Fi access for MFU and MFU Hospital.
projects.p4_long: Designed the UX/UI and developed the frontend for a facial recognition authentication system. Integrated with the ThaiID API, this system securely verifies user identities before granting Wi-Fi access across the MFU campus and MFU Hospital, ensuring high-level security and ease of use.
